title: BLUELIGHT RAT: WMI System Enumeration from Browser Child
description: Detects WMI-based system enumeration spawned by browser processes. After initial exploitation, BLUELIGHT queries Win32_ComputerSystem, Win32_OperatingSystem, and Win32_Processor to profile the target system before establishing full C2.
query: ('Log Source' = 'Windows Sysmon Events' or 'Log Source' = 'Windows Sysmon Operational Logs' or 'Log Source' = 'SOC Windows Sysmon Logs') and (('Event ID' = 1 and ('Parent Process Name' like '*\\iexplore.exe' or 'Parent Process Name' like '*\\wscript.exe' or 'Parent Process Name' like '*\\mshta.exe')) and (('Command Line' like '*Win32_ComputerSystem*' or 'Command Line' like '*Win32_OperatingSystem*' or 'Command Line' like '*Win32_Processor*' or 'Command Line' like '*Win32_NetworkAdapterConfiguration*' or 'Command Line' like '*Get-WmiObject*' or 'Command Line' like '*Get-CimInstance*')))
falsepositives: System management scripts launched via browser-based admin portals
